title: Problem with getting DATATYPE xsd:string back
key_bug_features: DATATYPE function fails for XML output
bug_feature_seed: SPARQL PREFIX vocab: <http://example.com/vocab#> INSERT DATA { GRAPH <http://test.graph/> { <http://example.com/Book/1> a vocab:Book ; vocab:title "Book 1" . } };
SPARQL PREFIX vocab: <http://example.com/vocab#> SELECT ?me ?title FROM <http://test.graph/> WHERE { ?me vocab:title ?title };
SPARQL PREFIX vocab: <http://example.com/vocab#> SELECT ?me ?title (DATATYPE(?title) AS ?dt) FROM <http://test.graph/> WHERE { ?me vocab:title ?title };
SPARQL PREFIX vocab: <http://example.com/vocab#> SELECT (STR(?title) AS ?s) (DATATYPE(?title) AS ?dt) FROM <http://test.graph/> WHERE { ?me vocab:title ?title };
SPARQL PREFIX vocab: <http://example.com/vocab#> INSERT DATA { GRAPH <http://test.graph/> { <http://example.com/Book/2> vocab:title "Book 2"^^<http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#string> . } };
SPARQL PREFIX vocab: <http://example.com/vocab#> SELECT ?me ?title (DATATYPE(?title) AS ?dt) FROM <http://test.graph/> WHERE { ?me vocab:title ?title };
SPARQL PREFIX vocab: <http://example.com/vocab#> INSERT DATA { GRAPH <http://test.graph/> { <http://example.com/Book/3> vocab:title "Book 3"@en . } };
SPARQL PREFIX vocab: <http://example.com/vocab#> SELECT ?me ?title (LANG(?title) AS ?lang) (DATATYPE(?title) AS ?dt) FROM <http://test.graph/> WHERE { ?me vocab:title ?title };
SPARQL PREFIX vocab: <http://example.com/vocab#> SELECT ?me ?title (BOUND(DATATYPE(?title)) AS ?b) FROM <http://test.graph/> WHERE { ?me vocab:title ?title };
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE vocab:Book (id INT PRIMARY KEY, title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL);
SELECT DISTINCT ?me ?var3 DATATYPE(?var3) AS ?var4 FROM vocab:Book WHERE ?me = 1;
SELECT DISTINCT ?me ?var3 DATATYPE(?var3) AS ?var4 WHERE ?var3 IS NULL;
